alkylation reagent: alkylated (12.5 mM iodoacetamide, room temperature, 1 hr in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (12.5 mM iodoacetamide, room temperature, 1 hr in the dark)
cleavage agent: digested overnight with LysC at an enzyme:substrate ratio of 1:100
fractionation method: prior to high pH reverse phase (HPRP) separation.
fragmentation method: followed by up to 10 HCD MS/MS spectra
instrument: analyzed by microcapillary liquid chromatography electrospray ionization tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) on an LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
